greeting.speaker: Friendly Greeter
greeting.text: Welcome to the Meadow! What can I help you with?

quest1_offer.speaker: Friendly Greeter
quest1_offer.text: The Fruit Trees around here are bursting with cherries! Could you harvest 5 for me? I'm putting together a welcome basket.

quest1_progress.speaker: Friendly Greeter
quest1_progress.text: Still gathering those cherries? The Fruit Trees are scattered around the meadow. Keep at it!

quest1_turnin.speaker: Friendly Greeter
quest1_turnin.text: Wonderful, those look delicious! Here, take these currants as thanks. You're a natural!

quest2_offer.speaker: Friendly Greeter
quest2_offer.text: You've got the harvesting down! Now it's time to learn a real skill. Open the Skills panel and learn Cooking I, then try baking some Bread.

quest2_progress.speaker: Friendly Greeter
quest2_progress.text: Learning takes time! Press K to open Skills, then once you've learned Cooking I, open your inventory with I and craft some Bread.

quest2_turnin.speaker: Friendly Greeter
quest2_turnin.text: You baked bread! The smell is incredible. I knew you had it in you. Here's a nice reward, and some extra cherries for the road.

quest3_offer.speaker: Friendly Greeter
quest3_offer.text: My friend the Handyman up in Demo Heights has been asking for fresh bread. Could you bake 2 loaves and bring them to him?

quest3_progress.speaker: Friendly Greeter
quest3_progress.text: The Handyman is waiting in Demo Heights! Bake 2 loaves of Bread and bring them to him.

idle_chat.speaker: Friendly Greeter
idle_chat.text: It's a beautiful day in the meadow. The trees are swaying, the butterflies are floating... what more could you ask for?

greeting.speaker: Handyman
greeting.text: Hey there! Always good to see a new face up here in the Heights.

options.text: I've got a bread delivery for you!
I'm working on getting your bread.

delivery_turnin.speaker: Handyman
delivery_turnin.text: Fresh bread! You have no idea how much I've been craving this. Here, take this pot and some currants. You've earned it!

delivery_progress.speaker: Handyman
delivery_progress.text: The Greeter mentioned you might be bringing bread? I can hardly wait. Come back when you've got 2 loaves!

idle_chat.speaker: Handyman
idle_chat.text: I've been fixing up this place for a while now. Always need more supplies though. If you ever meet the Greeter down in the Meadow, tell them I said hello!
